description: The Di Biasi clan, also known as 'i Faiano', was a Camorra organization operating in the Quartieri Spagnoli area of Naples, Italy. It emerged in the 1980s as a longa manus of the Giuliano clan. The clan was involved in drug trafficking and had a violent rivalry with the Russo clan, leading to multiple murders. In July 2008, a major police operation led to the arrest of several members, and the clan is now considered defunct.
